auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in with your Medyra account.
auth.signUpSubtitle: One account for web and mobile. 3 free reports per month.
auth.codeSent: We sent a verification code to {{email}}.
auth.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please check your details.
auth.signUpFailed: Sign up failed. Please try again.

home.freeLeft: {{remaining}} of {{limit}} free reports left this month
home.uploadSubtitle: Plain language explanation in under 60 seconds
home.emptyReports: Your analyzed documents appear here. They are deleted automatically after 30 days.
home.cameraNeededBody: Please allow camera access to photograph your document.
home.limitBody: You have used your 3 free reports this month. Upgrade to Personal for more.

report.saveToProfile: Save to a profile for trend tracking
report.createProfileHint: Create a health profile in the Profiles tab to track values over time.
report.sharedFooter: Explained with Medyra. Not medical advice.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.subtitle: Health history for you and your family
profiles.upsellTitle: Health profiles are part of Personal and Family
profiles.upsellBody: Track lab values over time for yourself and your family, and see trends across reports.
profiles.empty: No profiles yet. Create one to start tracking values across reports.
profiles.deleteBody: Delete {{name}} and its tracked values? Reports stay until they expire.
profiles.name: Name
profiles.longPressHint: Tip: long press a profile to delete it.

profileDetail.noValues: No tracked values yet. Save an analyzed report to this profile and its lab values appear here automatically.
profileDetail.oneMeasurement: One measurement so far. Upload more reports over time to see the trend.
profileDetail.noDocuments: No documents saved to this profile yet.

trends.title: Trends
trends.subtitle: Lab values over time, per profile
trends.upsellTitle: Trends are part of Personal and Family
trends.upsellBody: A single value means little. The trend across months tells the story.
trends.empty: Create a health profile first, then save analyzed reports to it. Tracked values show up here.

prep.title: Doctor Visit
prep.subtitle: Describe how you feel in any language. We turn it into a structured German summary your doctor can read in seconds.
prep.inputPlaceholder: Describe your symptoms, questions, or situation in your own words...
prep.tooShort: Please describe your situation in a bit more detail.
prep.limitBody: Your plan includes a limited number of doctor summaries per month. Upgrade for more.
prep.printNote: Show this summary to your doctor at the start of your visit.

learn.title: Learn
learn.blogDesc: Plain language guides to lab values and reports

paywall.headline: More clarity for you and your family
paywall.subtitle: One subscription works everywhere: web, iPhone, and Android.
paywall.note: Subscriptions are managed on medyra.de for now. Your plan unlocks the app automatically with the same account. Cancel anytime.
paywall.storeNote: Paid plans are currently not available for purchase in the app. If your Medyra account already has a plan, it is active here automatically.

settings.title: Settings
settings.freePlanUsage: Free plan · {{remaining}} of {{limit}} reports left this month
settings.aboutText: Medyra explains medical documents in plain language. We are supported by Potsdam Transfer, the startup service of the University of Potsdam.
settings.signOutBody: Sign out of Medyra on this device?
settings.deleteBody: This permanently deletes your account, all reports, and all profiles on web and mobile. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteFailedBody: Please try again, or email hello@medyra.de and we delete your account for you.
settings.deletionNote: Deletion is immediate and covers web and mobile (GDPR Art. 17).

consent.title: Your Health Data, Your Control
consent.subtitle: Required before your first upload · GDPR Art. 9
consent.intro: To analyze your medical report, Medyra needs to process your health data. Under EU law (GDPR), we must ask for your explicit consent before doing this.
consent.decline: No thanks, I do not consent
consent.footnote: Declining means your report will not be uploaded or stored. You can change this decision at any time.

disclaimer: Medyra is an educational tool that explains medical terminology: it does not provide medical advice, diagnoses, or treatment recommendations. Always consult your licensed physician before making any health decisions. Your data is handled in compliance with GDPR and automatically deleted after 30 days.
